notes: common has no fixed vendor API; synthesized a generic REST/HTTP surface mirroring its http.* helpers (http.get/post/put/patch/delete/request) against a user-configured baseUrl. The server URL (api.example.com) is a placeholder exposed as a server variable. Schemas (Resource, ResourceList, Response) are invented generics: Resource is an id plus arbitrary fields, Response mirrors the {body,statusCode,headers} wrapper common returns. Caveats: no real endpoints, paths, auth, or field names are described; this exists only to give the mocker a concrete generic REST resource to serve.
